title: RepoProof Configuration
description: Configuration schema for RepoProof repository quality auditor

ignoredPaths.description: Additional glob patterns to ignore beyond built-in defaults (node_modules, .git, dist, build, etc.)

disabledRules.description: Rule IDs to disable entirely. Findings from disabled rules are not included in the report.

severityOverrides.description: Override severity for specific rules. Values must be 'error', 'warning', or 'info'.

penaltyOverrides.description: Override score penalty for specific rules. Values must be non-negative integers.

minScore.description: Minimum passing score (0-100). Scan exits with code 1 if score is below this threshold.

maxFileSize.description: Maximum file size in bytes to scan. Files larger than this are skipped. Default: 1048576 (1 MB).

includedPaths.description: Only scan files whose relative paths begin with one of these prefixes. Empty array means scan all files.

excludedPaths.description: Exclude files whose relative paths begin with one of these prefixes.

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files to scan. Scanning stops when this limit is reached. Default: 10000.

maxTotalBytes.description: Maximum total bytes to scan across all files. Default: 524288000 (500 MB).

maxDirectoryDepth.description: Maximum directory depth to traverse. Default: 50.

failOn.description: Minimum severity to cause a non-zero exit. 'error' fails on errors only. 'warning' fails on errors or warnings.
